summary: Cross-validated Phase 004's first-action mandate against confidence boundaries, uncertainty pass-through, token caps, static hint-map drift, CLI skill triggering, legacy tests, and prompt-cache behavior.

label: Confidence boundary is inclusive at exactly 0.80
High uncertainty can still pass through passes_threshold true
Proposed concise hints fit both 80-token and 120-token caps
Static FIRST_ACTION_HINT coverage is already inventory-fragile
CLI skills can exceed 0.8 only on explicit delegation wording in observed fixtures
Legacy tests are string-pinned and must be updated intentionally
Prompt-cache hit rate should not change from brief wording alone
